todos.content: GLD_GOAL_EQ_MODULE_SMBUS — Module smbus functionality equals FunctionalModel
todos.detail:
kind: module
scope: {"level": "module", "rtl_module": "smbus", "rtl_file": "rtl/smbus.sv", "boundary": "module RTL observable outputs must be compared against FunctionalModel.apply"}
ssot_refs: cycle_model, cycle_model.arbitration.bus_arbitration, cycle_model.clock, cycle_model.handshake_rules.ack_check, cycle_model.handshake_rules.stop_after_nack, cycle_model.handshake_rules.valid_ready, cycle_model.latency, cycle_model.ordering.address_before_data, cycle_model.ordering.start_before_data, cycle_model.reset, function_model, function_model.invariants.addr_7bit, function_model.invariants.busy_mutex, function_model.invariants.idle_on_rst, function_model.state_variables.addr_reg, function_model.state_variables.bit_cnt, function_model.state_variables.busy, function_model.state_variables.data_reg, function_model.state_variables.nack_flag, function_model.state_variables.shift_reg, function_model.state_variables.state, function_model.transactions.read_byte, function_model.transactions.read_byte.inputs.addr, function_model.transactions.read_byte.output_rules.scl_out, function_model.transactions.read_byte.output_rules.sda_out, function_model.transactions.read_byte.state_updates.busy, function_model.transactions.read_byte.state_updates.shift_reg, function_model.transactions.read_byte.state_updates.state, function_model.transactions.send_stop, function_model.transactions.send_stop.output_rules.scl_out, function_model.transactions.send_stop.output_rules.sda_out, function_model.transactions.send_stop.state_updates.busy, function_model.transactions.send_stop.state_updates.state, function_model.transactions.write_byte, function_model.transactions.write_byte.inputs.addr, function_model.transactions.write_byte.inputs.data, function_model.transactions.write_byte.output_rules.scl_out, function_model.transactions.write_byte.output_rules.sda_out, function_model.transactions.write_byte.state_updates.busy, function_model.transactions.write_byte.state_updates.shift_reg, function_model.transactions.write_byte.state_updates.state, parameters.clk_freq_hz, parameters.smb_freq_hz, rtl_contract, top_module
decomposition_refs: smbus
coverage_refs: 
expected via: FunctionalModel.apply
owner_on_fail: rtl
todos.criteria:
Drive the RTL module boundary with stimulus derived from the same SSOT transaction intent used for FunctionalModel.apply
Observe only RTL module boundary outputs/state exposed by SSOT or rtl_contract
Compare RTL observed values against FunctionalModel.apply output; do not copy FL expected into rtl_observed
Record a scoreboard row for this module goal before top-level signoff

todos.content: GLD_AUG_CL_EMIT — Generate executable CL model for smbus
todos.activeForm: Verifying executable CL exists for smbus
todos.detail: Cycle-level model wraps FunctionalModel; provides .drive(), .tick(), .observe(), .coverage(). CL must NEVER re-evaluate output_rules/state_updates.
todos.criteria:
<ip>/model/cycle_model.py exists
File contains zero occurrences of output_rules / state_updates / _eval_rule_expr
CycleModel API smoke test passes

todos.content: GLD_AUG_SIGNATURE — Emit and verify model_signature.json for smbus
todos.detail: Signature must be fresh after every SSOT change; --check mode detects drift.
todos.criteria:
<ip>/model/model_signature.json exists
python3 emit_model_signature.py ${ip} --root . --check returns 0

todos.content: GLD_AUG_COCOTB_RUN — Run cocotb harness fl_cl_rtl end-to-end for smbus
todos.detail: Full DUT + FL + CL co-simulation; scoreboard compares RTL observable to FunctionalModel.apply expected.
todos.criteria:
make -C ${ip}/verify -f Makefile.sim fl_cl_rtl exits 0
Coverage report written under ${ip}/cov/

todos.content: GLD_AUG_LOOP_MAP — Emit human-vs-LLM loop_map.svg for smbus
todos.detail: Render <ip>/model/loop_map.mmd from authority_contract; convert to SVG.
todos.criteria: <ip>/model/loop_map.svg exists
